name: The Golfers Lounge Columbia
about: The Golfers Lounge is a multi-location golf simulator venue operating in South Carolina with three facilities in West Ashley, Summerville, and Columbia. It offers premium Trackman simulator technology with 24/7 access for members. The venue provides a range of membership options, from month-to-month to 12-month plans, and features a complimentary 2-hour bay session for new guests. The facilities are designed for both serious golf practice and casual play, featuring a library of over 400 courses including renowned venues like Pebble Beach. Members benefit from free bay time, discounts on lessons, and access to various training modes.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to top-of-the-line Trackman Simulator Technology
Free bay time for members with no hourly booking costs
Access to Shot Analysis mode with over 30 data points for swing improvement
Play on 400+ courses including Pebble Beach, Bethpage Black, and Pinehurst No. 2

food_and_drink.notes: No specific food service mentioned, BYOB implied
BYOB policy implied as not mentioned otherwise

simulator_hardware.notes: Top of the line Trackman Simulator Technology mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to allow BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) as there is no mention of a bar or drink service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, but simulator sessions are typically 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers putt-putt and easier entry-point games, making it suitable for those with less golf experience, including children.
